tests.name: ExpenseLiteBenchDemo seed validation

decisions: Kept BoardFlowBench root blackboard project-only and moved demo experiment state into initialized standalone workspaces.
Used P-series ids for project work and B-series ids for demo benchmark stickers.
Preserved existing embedded demo history on ExpenseLiteBenchDemo reference-history and created main as an orphan seed branch so agent-visible history does not contain answers.
Stored only the standalone target URL and fixed seed commit in BoardFlowBench.
Injected only the currently assigned demo task details while keeping a brief B001-B004 backlog visible.
Removed legacy T001 pilot records from the current tree without adding an archive directory; Git history remains the source for retrieval.
risks: The local sibling repository ../ExpenseLiteBenchDemo is complete, but https://github.com/ChenNeuro/ExpenseLiteBenchDemo.git does not exist yet. Create the empty GitHub repository before pushing main, reference-history, and benchmark-seed-v1.
P004 still needs to harden scorer semantics for unavailable baselines, board-view validation, handoff schema validation, and hygiene classification.
P001 and P002 handoffs retain historical command text that mentions the former embedded demo paths. Those entries are preserved as historical facts.
next_recommended_step: Create the empty ChenNeuro/ExpenseLiteBenchDemo GitHub repository, push the standalone branches and tag, then start P004 scorer calibration and hardening.
